Security Audit.name: Map Auth & Security Entries
Security Audit.description: Locate files that contain authentication middleware, tokens, encryption, or permissions.

Security Audit.name: Scan Code Vulnerabilities
Security Audit.description: Analyze JWT verification, credentials leaks, bare exceptions, and sanitization issues.

Security Audit.name: Draft Security Fixes
Security Audit.description: Propose security refactoring modifications to correct vulnerabilities.

Security Audit.name: Compile Security Audit Report
Security Audit.description: Summarize security findings, scores, and improvements.

Performance Audit.name: Identify Critical Path Files
Performance Audit.description: Find large modules, database models, and I/O handlers.

Performance Audit.name: Audit Resource Bottlenecks
Performance Audit.description: Inspect DB query efficiency, resource leak possibilities, and memory operations.

Performance Audit.name: Propose Efficiency Refactor
Performance Audit.description: Suggest optimizations, caching strategies, and memory buffering upgrades.

Performance Audit.name: Generate Performance Summary
Performance Audit.description: Summarize bottlenecks, CPU/memory recommendations, and overall speed rating.

Architecture Review.name: Inspect Module Tree
Architecture Review.description: Trace structural entrypoints and module dependencies.

Architecture Review.name: Review Design Patterns
Architecture Review.description: Analyze modularity, decoupling, SOLID structure, and dependencies.

Architecture Review.name: Summarize Architectural Blueprint
Architecture Review.description: Formulate executive report on structural strengths, flaws, and plans.

Documentation Generation.name: Locate Undocumented Files
Documentation Generation.description: Find modules lacking JSDoc, Docstrings, or README files.

Documentation Generation.name: Generate Inline Docstrings & READMEs
Documentation Generation.description: Write block comments, module descriptions, and API guides.

Documentation Generation.name: Assemble Documentation Report
Documentation Generation.description: Summarize new docs created and outline remaining gaps.

Test Generation.name: Map Test Coverage Gaps
Test Generation.description: Scan codebase for unit tests, specs, and modules lacking tests.

Test Generation.name: Draft Test Suites
Test Generation.description: Write unit, integration, or mock tests for unverified functions.

Test Generation.name: Assemble Testing Strategy
Test Generation.description: Output testing recommendations and test suite report.

Bug Investigation.name: Trace Bug Repros
Bug Investigation.description: Find components handling parameters, exceptions, or errors.

Bug Investigation.name: Scan Critical Logic Vulnerabilities
Bug Investigation.description: Examine bare except blocks, bad variables typing, or resource leakage.

Bug Investigation.name: Suggest Bugfix Refactorings
Bug Investigation.description: Formulate code changes to patch the target issue.

Bug Investigation.name: Generate Bug Summary Report
Bug Investigation.description: Draft findings, root causes, and verification strategies.

Dependency Review.name: Review Installed Packages Quality
Dependency Review.description: Analyze package versions, deprecations, and redundant imports.

Dependency Review.name: Dependency Summary Report
Dependency Review.description: Audit library sizes, licensing, and update recommendations.

Refactoring Plan.name: Audit Structural Layouts
Refactoring Plan.description: Locate unmodular code modules and messy folders.

Refactoring Plan.name: Identify Code Smells
Refactoring Plan.description: Detect duplication, long methods, nested conditional branches.

Refactoring Plan.name: Propose Refactoring Diffs
Refactoring Plan.description: Draft code modifications diffs for human approval.

Refactoring Plan.name: Synthesize Refactoring Report
Refactoring Plan.description: Detail changes, impacts, and verification plans.
